# Emanuel Flury - Agentic AI Training & Setup for Swiss SMEs

> I help Swiss SMEs implement AI that works. Hands-on training and setup of AI agents and workflows using tools like Claude Code.

## About

Emanuel Flury is an independent AI automation consultant based in Grenchen, Switzerland. With 13+ years of Fortune 100 experience (including Johnson & Johnson), I bring enterprise-grade AI automation methods to Swiss SMEs — same methods, practical approach, honest pricing.

## Services

### AI Training (from CHF 2,500)
Hands-on workshops teaching your team to use AI tools like Claude Code effectively. Learn to build agents, automate tasks, and integrate AI into daily workflows.
- Team workshops (2-4 weeks)
- Claude Code & AI tools
- Practical exercises
- Ongoing support
- Result: Your team uses AI independently within 4 weeks

### Workflow Setup (from CHF 5,000)
Custom AI agents and automated workflows designed for your specific business processes. From concept to production-ready implementation.
- Process analysis
- Custom AI agents
- Workflow automation
- Integration with your tools
- Result: Working automation from day one (3-6 weeks)

### Ongoing Support (from CHF 500/month)
Continued guidance as your AI capabilities grow. Regular check-ins, troubleshooting, and help expanding to new use cases.
- Regular check-ins
- Troubleshooting help
- New use case development
- Knowledge transfer
- Result: Continuous improvement and new use cases

## The eFlury Method™

A proven 5-phase framework for successful AI implementation:
1. **Analyse** - Workflow mapping, identifying automation potential (Week 1)
2. **Architect** - Design technical solution, tool selection (Week 1-2)
3. **Build** - Hands-on implementation with your team (Week 2-3)
4. **Activate** - Training, go-live, handover (Week 3-4)
5. **Amplify** - Optimization, new use cases, ongoing support (Ongoing)

## Technologies

- **AI**: Claude/Anthropic
- **Automation**: Make, Zapier, n8n
- **Business**: Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Notion

## Ideal Clients

**Good fit:**
- Swiss SMEs with 5-50 employees
- Businesses wanting to automate repetitive processes
- Companies without internal IT resources for AI
- Those seeking practical implementation, not theory
- Organizations valuing Swiss quality and data protection

**Not a fit:**
- Companies just wanting to "have a look"
- Projects without a dedicated contact person
- Budgets under CHF 2,000

## How I Work

1. **Discovery Call** - Free 30-minute call. I learn your workflows, you learn if I can help. No pitch, just conversation.
2. **Opportunity Report** - Within 48 hours, written summary: what to automate, expected time savings, honest assessment.
3. **Clear Proposal** - Fixed-price quote. No hourly surprises. You know exactly what you get and what it costs.
4. **Hands-On Implementation** - I work alongside your team. Not a report that sits in a drawer — actual working automation.
5. **30-Day Support** - Questions after go-live? I'm available. Your success is my reputation.
